steps.title: Use the publication date
steps.content: The student's goal is to specify when al-Biruni published his landmass theory. The relevant note is the one that gives both the publication event and the date: he published the theory in 1037 CE.

steps.title: Exclude incomplete notes
steps.content: Choice B mentions a theory about a landmass but omits the date. Choice C identifies al-Biruni as an Iranian scholar but does not mention the theory or publication date. Choice D describes the theory but also omits when it was published. The answer is A.
